aestheticPass.portrait: Upgraded from simple geometric icon to bust-style peasant portrait with straw hat, beard, pickaxe, team hat band, and leather straps.
aestheticPass.mapModel: Reduced large team-color blocks and exposed more tunic/leather/straw/tool surfaces.
aestheticPass.paintedBillboard: Added a project-original camera-facing peasant art layer so the in-map worker reads as a character instead of only procedural blocks.
aestheticPass.healthBar: Worker health bar narrowed from generic unit width to reduce visual occlusion.

publicShareCopyBoundary.allowed: Worker 当前使用项目原创手绘 peasant billboard + 3D proxy，已经能支撑公开分享截图里的农民观感。
forbidden: Worker 最终模型已经完成。
Worker 已经有正式第三方 GLB。
Worker 美术已经批准导入。

nextSteps: Find or create a clean worker/engineer/peasant GLB candidate with public-share-safe license.
Use the current procedural silhouette as the approval baseline for future GLB replacement.
Do not import sample-only or unclear-license worker art as a runtime asset.
